checks.description: Guardrail: ensure that when the buffer is full, a write attempt does not alter state.
checks.pass_condition: FULL remains asserted, EMPTY remains deasserted, and dataOut unchanged after a write stimulus while FULL is high.
checks.trigger_condition: When the linked plan applies a write stimulus while FULL is asserted.

checks.description: Verify that a legal write operation clears EMPTY and updates flags appropriately.
checks.pass_condition: After a write stimulus when buffer is not full, EMPTY deasserts (0) and FULL asserts only when capacity reached; dataOut remains unchanged until a read.
checks.trigger_condition: When the basic_001 plan applies EN=1, RW=0 with a non-zero dataIn.
